login.title: Sign in to Ondo
login.subtitle: Owners, tenants, admins, and maintenance teams use a single portal. Your role determines the dashboard we open.
login.resolveErrors: Please resolve validation errors before submitting.
login.invalidCredentials: Invalid email or password. Please try again.
login.unexpectedError: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
login.roleSelectorIntro: Pick the workspace you want to open. We'll tailor the preview and demo shortcuts to that role.
login.managerAccessHint: Manager/Admin access opens operations, approvals, reporting, and maintenance coordination.
login.ownerAccessHint: Owner access opens portfolio performance, rent collection, and maintenance.
login.tenantAccessHint: Tenant access opens rent, documents, maintenance, and messages.
login.maintenanceAccessHint: Maintenance access opens assigned tickets, media uploads, schedules, and status updates.
login.securityDesc: Your invite links, passwords, and upcoming MFA settings keep roles isolated.
login.credentialsDesc: Owners request onboarding. Tenants use an invite. Managers/admins and maintenance teams sign in with their assigned workspace credentials.
login.maintenanceStep2: Upload before/after media from the field
login.maintenanceStep3: Track schedules, notes, and vendor context
login.maintenanceStep4: Close work orders and notify residents
login.demoHelperDesc: These seeded accounts autofill the login form and keep the selected role in sync for the demo environment.
login.demoReadyMessage: {{role}} demo credentials are ready. Review the form and continue.

forgotPassword.title: Forgot your password?
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link.
forgotPassword.resetSent: We've sent a password reset link to your email address.
forgotPassword.unexpectedError: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

resetPassword.title: Reset your password
resetPassword.successDesc: Your password has been reset. You can now log in.
resetPassword.unexpectedError: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

signup.title: Complete your registration
signup.subtitle: You've been invited to Ondo Real Estate. Set up your account to get started.
signup.successDesc: Your account has been created. Redirecting...
signup.unexpectedError: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

validation.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address.
validation.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 6 characters.
validation.passwordWeak: Password must be at least 8 characters.
